prism-harness/v1.description: Verify and activate Prism Harness Pack v1 manifests and hashed assets.

prism-driver/v1.description: Resolve Prism Driver v1 contracts through a verified host adapter.

prism-host/vesicle@1.description: Provide the Prism Vesicle v1 host contract.

prism-interaction/confirmation@1.description: Pause and resume declared confirmation checkpoints.

quality-guard/anti-ai-flavor@1.description: Apply target-aware Anti-AI-Flavor deterministic quality policy.

quality-analysis/anti-ai-flavor@1.description: Expose Anti-AI-Flavor findings to analysis-only producers.

quality-detector/document-metrics@1.description: Evaluate the finite Rule Pack v1 document metric signal registry.

quality-judge/anti-ai-flavor@1.description: Execute the verified tool-free Anti-AI-Flavor Judge contract.

rule-replacement/v1.description: Apply a verified literal or template replacement rule projection.

artifact.inspect.description: Locate, enumerate, search, and read declared resources or project artifacts.

artifact.compose.description: Create directories and files, then write, replace, or append content.

artifact.snapshot.description: Copy a single-writer state artifact before mutation.

research.external.description: Perform attributable external research for bounded source-material gaps.

interaction.confirm.description: Pause at a declared blocking checkpoint and accept or reject progression.

interaction.select.description: Request one choice from mutually exclusive workflow options.

agent.delegate.description: Delegate a bounded task to a declared Agent Profile.

quality.guard.description: Apply host-managed pre-delivery quality policy to a candidate.

quality.analyze.description: Return deterministic or semantic quality findings for evaluation.

workflow.handoff.description: Request a confirmed handoff to another Prism Engine for future turns.
